title: spiraea × vanhouttei
intro: Spiraea × vanhouttei, also known as Vanhoutte spirea, is a deciduous shrub that is a cross between Spiraea japonica and Spiraea salicifolia, often used in ornamental gardening. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Spiraea × vanhouttei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Spiraea × vanhouttei, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
